title: Interpret Tote Presence And Empty Rack Colors On The Container Selection Screen
summary: Use the documented color coding on the Container Selection screen to determine whether a rack location contains a tote or is empty. The source states that dark blue indicates the presence of a tote, light blue represents an empty rack, and selecting an item shows a box icon and the tote number.
when_to_use: Use this reference when viewing the Container Selection screen and you need to determine whether a displayed rack or tote location contains a tote or is empty based on the documented color meanings.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to infer meanings for colors other than dark blue and light blue.
Do not use this runbook as authority for actions beyond visual interpretation of the Container Selection screen.
Do not use this runbook to confirm physical tote presence without additional verification if the screen display is unclear or does not match the documented meanings.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Container Selection screen, compare displayed colors to the documented meanings, and use selection behavior to verify the displayed item when needed.

safety_notes: This is a visual reference procedure only; no physical intervention is supported by the source.
Do not infer additional color meanings beyond those explicitly stated in the source.
Seek clarification if the displayed color does not match the documented dark blue or light blue meanings.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Container Selection screen
Visual ability to compare displayed colors to the documented meanings

access_required: Access to the Container Selection screen
system_preconditions: The Container Selection screen is open or visible.
The rack or tote display area to be checked is visible on screen.

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Container Selection screen color-coded rack area and the documented note that dark blue indicates a tote, light blue indicates an empty rack, and selection shows a box icon and tote number.

steps.title: Open or view the Container Selection screen
steps.purpose: Ensure the operator is looking at the correct interface before interpreting rack or tote status.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Container Selection screen and locate the rack or tote display area.
steps.expected_result: The Container Selection screen is visible and the relevant rack or tote location can be seen.
steps.healthy_condition: The rack or tote display area is visible on the Container Selection screen.
steps.failure_condition: The Container Selection screen or the relevant display area is not visible.

actions.label: View Container Selection screen
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Container Selection screen and locate the rack or tote display area.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Container Selection screen color-coded rack area used to interpret tote presence versus empty rack status.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Container Selection screen cannot be accessed or viewed.
The rack or tote display area is not visible enough to interpret color state.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR: 'Dark blue indicates the presence of a tote. While light blue represents empty rack. If you select it, a box icon will show as well as the tote number'

source_evidence.short_description: Training video frame showing the Container Selection screen for locating totes, racks, or AGVs, with transcript context mentioning an AGB battery warning below 30%.

steps.title: Observe the displayed color for the location
steps.purpose: Identify the visual state that will be interpreted using the documented color meanings.
steps.instruction: Observe the displayed color for the rack or tote location you want to check.
steps.expected_result: A visible color state is identified for the selected rack or tote location.
steps.healthy_condition: The location shows a visible color that can be compared to the documented meanings.
steps.failure_condition: The color is unclear, not visible, or does not match the documented colors.

actions.label: Inspect displayed color
actions.exact_action: Observe the displayed color for the rack or tote location you want to check.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The color shown for the rack or tote location being checked.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed color cannot be determined.
The displayed color does not appear to be dark blue or light blue.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR: 'Dark blue indicates the presence of a tote. While light blue represents empty rack. If you select it, a box icon will show as well as the tote number'

steps.title: Interpret dark blue as tote present
steps.purpose: Apply the source-defined meaning for dark blue on the Container Selection screen.
steps.instruction: Interpret dark blue as indicating the presence of a tote.
steps.expected_result: A dark blue location is understood to contain a tote.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed location is dark blue and is interpreted as tote present.
steps.failure_condition: A dark blue location is interpreted inconsistently with the source or the display is ambiguous.

actions.label: Interpret dark blue state
actions.exact_action: Interpret dark blue as indicating the presence of a tote.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The dark blue rack or tote state described by the source as indicating tote presence.

stop_or_escalate_if: The dark blue state is not clearly distinguishable.
The interface appears inconsistent with the documented meaning.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR: 'Dark blue indicates the presence of a tote. While light blue represents empty rack. If you select it, a box icon will show as well as the tote number'

steps.title: Interpret light blue as empty rack

steps.instruction: Interpret light blue as representing an empty rack.
steps.expected_result: A light blue location is understood to be empty.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed location is light blue and is interpreted as an empty rack.
steps.failure_condition: A light blue location is interpreted inconsistently with the source or the display is ambiguous.

steps.title: Select the item to verify icon and tote number if needed
steps.purpose: Use the source-described selection behavior to further verify the displayed item when additional confirmation is needed.
steps.instruction: If needed, select the displayed item and verify whether a box icon and tote number appear as described in the source.
steps.expected_result: When selected, the item shows a box icon and the tote number as described by the source.
steps.healthy_condition: Selection displays a box icon and tote number for the selected item.
steps.failure_condition: Selection does not show the expected box icon and tote number, or the result is unclear.

actions.label: Select displayed item
actions.exact_action: Select the displayed item and verify whether a box icon and tote number appear.

stop_or_escalate_if: Selecting the item does not show the expected box icon and tote number.
The selected item behavior conflicts with the documented source description.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR: 'Dark blue indicates the presence of a tote. While light blue represents empty rack. If you select it, a box icon will show as well as the tote number'

success_criteria: The user can distinguish tote-present versus empty-rack states on the Container Selection screen using the documented dark blue and light blue color meanings.
When additional verification is needed, selecting the displayed item shows a box icon and tote number as described in the source.
healthy_conditions: Dark blue is interpreted as tote present.
Light blue is interpreted as empty rack.
Selecting an item, when needed, shows a box icon and tote number.
failure_conditions: The displayed color does not match the documented dark blue or light blue meanings.
The displayed color is unclear or cannot be reliably compared to the documented meanings.
Selecting the item does not show the expected box icon and tote number.
Additional color meanings are inferred without source support.
escalation_guidance: Escalate or seek clarification if the displayed color does not match the documented dark blue or light blue meanings in the source.
Do not infer additional color meanings beyond those explicitly stated in the source.
Seek clarification if the selected item does not show the expected box icon and tote number.
